Academy

Durchsuchen Sie die Kurse, Webinare, Veranstaltungen und Schulungsprogramme der chen.ist Academy in den Bereichen Cybersicherheit, Open Source, Cloud und Softwareentwicklung.
 
Academy Courses

Explore comprehensive courses in cybersecurity, open-source development, Linux administration, data privacy, and security awareness training.

Learn about chen.ist Academy’s educational philosophy, hands-on approach, and commitment to real-world technical skills development.

Bildungsprogramme

file-synchronization
open-source
security

productivity
workflow
tools

document-preparation
typesetting
academic
open-source

Veranstaltungen

Webbinarier

Delta i kostnadsfria webbinarier om cybersäkerhet, molntjänster, AI, mjukvaruutveckling och digital transformation ledda av branschexperter.
 
Webinare

Participați la webinare gratuite despre securitate cibernetică, cloud computing, AI, dezvoltare software și transformare digitală, susținute de experți din industrie.
 
Webinare

Nehmen Sie an kostenlosen Webinaren zu Cybersicherheit, Cloud Computing, KI, Softwareentwicklung und digitaler Transformation teil, geleitet von Branchenexperten.
 
Webinars

Join free webinars on cybersecurity, cloud computing, AI, software development, and digital transformation led by industry experts.
 
Webinars

Browse and register for free online webinars on cybersecurity, cloud, AI, development, and business topics from chen.ist Academy.
 
Week 1: Digital Threat Landscape

Week 1 module covering the digital threat landscape, common cyberattack types, and how to assess your personal cybersecurity risk profile.
 
Week 1: Introduction to Cybersecurity

Learn cybersecurity basics in Week 1: key concepts, threat landscapes, the CIA triad, risk management, and how to develop a security mindset with practical exercises.
 
Week 1: Introduction to Open Source

Week 1 module introducing open source software principles, licensing models, community governance, and the history of the open source movement.
 
Week 1: Privacy Fundamentals and Legal Frameworks

Week 1 module exploring privacy fundamentals, the evolution of data protection, and key global legal frameworks including GDPR and CCPA.
 
Week 1: Security Awareness Fundamentals

Week 1 module on security awareness fundamentals, exploring cognitive biases, social engineering tactics, and the human role in cybersecurity.
 
Week 1: Unix/Linux Fundamentals

Week 1 module covering Unix and Linux history, filesystem hierarchy, essential command-line tools, and navigating Linux distributions.

Zero Trust Security Architecture

Learn to implement zero trust security architecture for enterprise protection in this 90-minute webinar with CHENIST Team CHENIST Team.
